objective: Review the authentication module for security issues and generate a refactored version with improved input validation.

actions_taken.output_summary: Found 6 files: index.ts, middleware.ts, token.ts, session.ts, validators.ts, types.ts
Retrieved 218 lines. Identified 3 potential issues: missing rate limiting, unvalidated redirect URLs, verbose error messages.
Retrieved 142 lines. Token expiry validation present. JWT secret sourced from env var (correct).
12 warnings, 2 errors (unused variable, missing null check). No security-specific lint rules triggered.

actions_taken.input_summary: Analyze auth middleware and token files. Identify security concerns. Produce refactored middleware with rate limiting and input validation.
actions_taken.output_summary: Produced security review (4 findings, 2 medium, 2 low) and refactored middleware.ts with inline comments.

actions_taken.input_summary: Write security-review.md and middleware.refactored.ts to output/auth-review/

outcome_summary: Security review complete. 4 findings documented (2 medium, 2 low severity). Refactored middleware with rate limiting and input validation written to output/auth-review/. Ready for developer review and manual application.
reviewer_notes: Reviewed findings — rate limiting suggestion accepted, redirect URL validation to be implemented in follow-up ticket.
